name: Architect of Reality
subtitle: An Operating System for a Civilization That Survives
about: Civilizational systems design, AI alignment, life-as-negentropy axiom

grand_axiom.statement: Life is the irreducible value of any sustainable system
grand_axiom.formalization: Life as the only known irreversible negentropy process in the Universe
grand_axiom.implication: Any system — biological or artificial — that reduces life's complexity is misaligned by definition

anthosphere.definition: The sphere of flourishing — stage after Noosphere where intelligence serves life at all scales
anthosphere.motto: Anthosphere — those who build and do not forget

ai_alignment_argument.core: Life-as-negentropy as a mathematically grounded alignment axiom transcending cultural relativism
ai_alignment_argument.goodhart_connection: Civilizational systems are misaligned optimizers — a direct application of Goodhart's Law at scale
ai_alignment_argument.cosmic_argument: Biological life as cosmic failsafe — a backup-systemic argument for why intelligence should protect life
